site.tagline.message: Supercharge your Java application with the power of LLMs - LangChain4j Chinese Documentation

homepage.hero.logoAlt.message: LangChain4j Documentation - Java LLM application development framework logo
homepage.hero.logoAlt.description: Alt text for the homepage hero logo

homepage.meta.description.message: LangChain4j is an idiomatic Java framework for building LLM applications. Unified API for 20+ LLM providers (OpenAI, Azure, Gemini, Claude, Qwen, DeepSeek, Ollama) and 30+ vector stores; built-in RAG, Agents, Tools (Function Calling), MCP, AI Services, with first-class Spring Boot / Quarkus / Helidon / Micronaut integrations.

homepage.seo.heading.message: LangChain4j - the Java LLM application framework

homepage.seo.paragraph1.message: LangChain4j is the Java-native framework for building LLM-powered applications. It offers a unified API to access 20+ major LLMs (OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, Google Gemini, Anthropic Claude, Qwen, DeepSeek, ERNIE, ZhipuAI GLM, Ollama, etc.) and 30+ vector stores (Milvus, Pinecone, Weaviate, Qdrant, Elasticsearch, PgVector, and more).

homepage.seo.paragraph2.message: It ships high-level building blocks for RAG, Agents, Tools (Function Calling), MCP (Model Context Protocol), AI Services, Chat Memory and Guardrails, with first-class Spring Boot, Quarkus, Helidon and Micronaut integrations - so Java engineers can ship production-grade AI applications fast.

homepage.features.easy.title.message: Easy interaction with LLMs and Vector Stores

homepage.features.easy.description.message: All major commercial and open-source LLMs and Vector Stores are easily accessible through a unified API, enabling you to build chatbots, assistants and more.

homepage.features.java.description.message: Smooth integration into your Java applications is made possible thanks to Quarkus, Spring Boot and Helidon integrations. There is two-way integration between LLMs and Java: you can call LLMs from Java and allow LLMs to call your Java code in return.

homepage.features.toolbox.description.message: Our extensive toolbox provides a wide range of tools for common LLM operations, from low-level prompt templating, chat memory management, and output parsing, to high-level patterns like Agents and RAG.
